entrypoints.description: Starts or reuses the local SOCKS5 agent in background and triggers the Telegram connect flow.
Visible CLI fallback for manual connect runs and debugging.
Prints the tg://socks deep link without opening Telegram.
Hidden background launcher used by Windows autostart to keep the local SOCKS5 agent alive.

prerequisites: Telegram Desktop installed with tg:// protocol handler registered
notes: This packaging path is self-contained and does not require user-installed Node.js.
The installer registers a per-user Windows Run entry so TG-prox starts again after login.
The post-install launch runs in background and should leave the local SOCKS5 agent active without a visible console window.
Control plane is HTTPS remote config only.
Data plane is direct outbound TCP in the current MVP.
